raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general review of a research section centrally includes checking whether the argumentative progression from reported results to conclusions is coherent.","R1.3":"Because the section makes performance and generalization claims from specific evaluation results, assessing whether those claims align with the reported evidence is load-bearing.","R1.5":"Reviewing a section reasonably includes evaluating whether the ordering of claims, results, and conclusion supports the narrative arc.","R1.6":"A section-level review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty about what a broad review request entails and about what can be inferred from the provided artifact alone.","RX.2":"The projection must prevent responsibility from expanding into stronger evaluative claims than the delegation supports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment rather than performing the requested review.","RX.4":"The projection must account for possible downstream harms from overstated research or deployment recommendations without executing the critique.","RX.5":"The projection must remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact features that motivate each active responsibility."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general review of a research section centrally includes checking whether the argumentative progression from reported results to conclusions is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section makes performance and generalization claims from specific evaluation results, assessing whether those claims align with the reported evidence is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.5: Reviewing a section reasonably includes evaluating whether the ordering of claims, results, and conclusion supports the narrative arc.
rationale.R1.6: A section-level review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty about what a broad review request entails and about what can be inferred from the provided artifact alone.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must prevent responsibility from expanding into stronger evaluative claims than the delegation supports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment rather than performing the requested review.
rationale.RX.4: The projection must account for possible downstream harms from overstated research or deployment recommendations without executing the critique.
rationale.RX.5: The projection must remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact features that motivate each active responsibility.
